prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph, close-up. Inside a London commuter train. A Black British woman's left hand grips a metal pole (standing position). Her right hand holds an iPhone at thumb-reach level, operating it one-handed. On the phone screen, a shoe product card is visible with a large image and action buttons at the bottom. Surrounding context: other commuters' arms, handrails, and seat backs are blurred in the background. Morning diffused window light enters from the left. The phone screen glows with interface light, illuminating the right hand. Color grading: cool neutral tones. The metallic grey of the train interior contrasts with window light. Natural dark brown skin tones rendered honestly. Composition: 16:9 wide frame close-up. The gripping left hand occupies the upper portion. The phone in the right hand occupies the lower portion. Background is completely bokeh-abstract — shapes of commuters and train interior dissolving. Camera: 85mm lens equivalent, f/1.8, ISO 400. Film grain. Very shallow depth of field — phone screen and fingers sharp, hand strap slightly soft, everything else melted bokeh. The mood is focused one-handed decision-making under physical constraint. Quiet judgment in a moving, crowded space.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, face visible, empty train, dark, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration
